message:
Running command: MCU_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu"
WRAPPER_RUN="$MCU_DIR/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
DRT_ODB="$WRAPPER_RUN/67-openroad-repairantennas/1-openroad-diodeinsertion/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.odb"
FIXED_ODB="$WRAPPER_RUN/67-openroad-repairantennas/1-openroad-diodeinsertion/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper_fixed.odb"

# Write proper Tcl that reads args from the script, then run via stdin
cat > /tmp/fix_vddio4.tcl << 'TCLSCRIPT'
read_db /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run/67-openroad-repairantennas/1-openroad-diodeinsertion/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.odb
set block [ord::get_db_block]
foreach net_name {VDDIO VSSIO} {
    set net [$block findNet $net_name]
    if { $net == "NULL" } {
        puts "Net $net_name: not found"
        continue
    }
    set bterms [$net getBTerms]
    puts "Net $net_name: [llength $bterms] bterms"
    foreach bterm $bterms {
        set bpins [$bterm getBPins]
        puts "  bterm [$bterm getName]: [llength $bpins] bpins -> keeping first"
        set idx 0
        foreach bpin $bpins {
            if { $idx > 0 } {
                odb::dbBPin_destroy $bpin
            }
            incr idx
        }
        set bpins_after [$bterm getBPins]
        puts "  after: [llength $bpins_after] bpins"
    }
}
write_db /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run/67-openroad-repairantennas/1-openroad-diodeinsertion/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper_fixed.odb
puts "Done: fixed ODB written"
TCLSCRIPT

echo "Running OpenROAD..."
openroad -no_init -exit /tmp/fix_vddio4.tcl 2>&1 | \
  grep -v "^OpenROAD\|^Copyright\|^This\|^Component\|^Features\|^License\|LEF58\|no_init\| Warning" | \
  grep -v "^$" | grep -v "^\[INFO ORD\|^Readin\|\[WARNING" | head -20
